name: open-generative-ai
description: Open-source alternative to HF AI — AI image, video, cinema and lip sync studio

scripts.build:packages: npm run build:workflow && npm run build:agent && npm run build:studio
scripts.setup: git submodule update --init --recursive && npm install && npm run build:packages
scripts.postinstall: cd packages/Open-AI-Design-Agent/packages/design-agent && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../.. && cd packages/Open-Poe-AI/packages/agents && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../..
